name: Delhi Agra Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Pick up from airport/hotels/ railway stn
itinerary.description: Pick up from airport/hotels/ railway stn. and proceed to Agra it will take 3/4 Hrs. and a guided tour to visit The Taj Mahal, Agra fort and overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast  proceed to Delhi and a guided tour to visit Lotus Temple, Qutun
itinerary.description:
After breakfast  proceed to Delhi and a guided tour to visit Lotus Temple, Qutun minar, India Gate,  President house and drop you at the airport/ hotels/railway stn. with sweet memories.
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours

itinerary.title: Arrival at Delhi Airport/Railway station company representative assist you & pro
itinerary.description: Arrival at Delhi Airport/Railway station company representative assist you & proceed to Agra. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Today, After breakfast a guided  tour to visit Taj Mahal & Agra fort & after lun
itinerary.description: Today, After breakfast a guided  tour to visit Taj Mahal & Agra fort & after lunch proceed to Delhi. Overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.title: After breakfast, a guided tour to visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, India Gate, Presi
itinerary.description:
After breakfast, a guided tour to visit Jama Masjid, Red Fort, India Gate, President House, Humayun Tomb, Qutub Minar, & departure transfer to the airport/railway station.
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
